name: Potion of Giant Strength (Storm)
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score changes for 1 hour. This potion grants Storm Giant Strength. The potion has no effect on you if your Strength is equal to or greater than 29. This potion's transparent liquid has floating in it a sliver of light resembling a giant's fingernail.

strength_boost.no_effect_if: Your Strength is equal to or greater than 29

properties.appearance: Transparent liquid with floating sliver of light resembling giant's fingernail
